title: Join us in our Q&A sessions!
excerpt:

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Once a week, we offer devs the chance to join us in our Q&A sessions in which we will have an open call to talk about questions, issues and recommendations our community has!

If you have questions or issues we can help you with, or if you just want to listen other devs and what they are doing with monday, this is the right place for you!

You are all welcome to join every Tuesday at 14:00 GMT

You can book your spot here !

See you there

posts.author: mactoph (Christopher Phillips)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks - this is a great opportunity and I am looking forward to it next week!
